Package com.amani.amaniapirest.services.profile

Class ProfileService

java.lang.Object
com.amani.amaniapirest.services.profile.ProfileService
@Service public class ProfileService extends Object
Servicio de negocio que encapsula la logica de operaciones relacionadas con profile.

1.0
Author:
AMANI Development Team
